summary: Iteration 19: Tested new 'Elimina account' feature in Gestione Utenti. All core features working correctly - DELETE /api/users deletes clean accounts, blocks self-delete, blocks last Admin deletion, blocks users with linked data. No regressions on user creation, toggle active, reset password, role change.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test users during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delete user feature fully implemented and tested. All protections working: self-delete blocked (button disabled + API returns 400), last Admin blocked (API returns 400), users with linked data blocked (API returns 409 with clear message). Report Operativo and Report Eventi pages verified intact.

delete_button_visible.details: 9 delete buttons visible on /utenti page, one per user row

delete_clean_user.details: DELETE /api/users successfully deletes users without linked data, returns 200 with {ok: true}

delete_self_blocked.details: DELETE /api/users returns 400 with error 'Non puoi eliminare il tuo account mentre sei loggato'. UI button is disabled with tooltip.

delete_last_admin_blocked.details: DELETE /api/users returns 400 with error 'Non puoi eliminare l'ultimo Admin' when trying to delete the last admin

delete_user_with_linked_data_blocked.details: DELETE /api/users returns 409 with error 'Utente con dati collegati: usa Disattiva invece di Elimina'

create_user_no_regression.details: POST /api/users creates new user correctly, returns 201

toggle_active_no_regression.details: PATCH /api/users with isActive toggles user status correctly

reset_password_no_regression.details: PATCH /api/users with newPassword resets password, user can login with new password

change_role_no_regression.details: PATCH /api/users with role changes user role correctly

report_operativo_intact.details: /report/azienda loads with FASE 3 badge, KPI cards, filters, Export Excel/PDF buttons

report_eventi_intact.details: /report/eventi loads with filters, KPI cards (40 eventi, 5066 ospiti), charts, Scarica Excel/PDF buttons

utenti_page.title: Gestione Utenti
utenti_page.description: Solo Admin: creazione, attivazione, ruolo, reset password ed eliminazione account con protezioni.
utenti_page.delete_buttons: 9 delete buttons with red styling (border-red-200 text-red-700)
utenti_page.self_delete_disabled: Admin's own delete button is disabled with title='Non puoi eliminare il tuo account loggato'
utenti_page.status_messages: Shows '✅ Utente creato' and '✅ Utente eliminato' correctly

DELETE /api/users.self_delete: 400 {error: 'Non puoi eliminare il tuo account mentre sei loggato'}
DELETE /api/users.linked_data: 409 {error: 'Utente con dati collegati: usa Disattiva invece di Elimina'}
